title: Diana's Digital Twin
shortDescription: A multi-interface AI Digital Twin backend built with FastAPI and OpenAI GPT, reachable via Telegram and an embeddable web chat widget.
detailedDescription: A modular FastAPI service that separates core AI orchestration from interface adapters, currently supporting Telegram and web chat. Uses Redis for persistent history, rolling summarization, rate limiting, and OTP pairing, with seamless Web-Telegram deep-link sync. Includes tiered on-demand context loading for token efficiency, structured JSON logging, and Railway-ready Docker deployment.

title: CV & Job Application Tool
shortDescription: An AI-powered job search platform for CV/JD fit scoring, gap analysis, tailored CV generation, interview prep, and application tracking.
detailedDescription: A Next.js 16 + React 19 platform with PostgreSQL and NextAuth.js v5 that analyzes CV-job fit, generates tailored CV suggestions, and builds interview prep packs. Includes a job tracker with interview session logs, pipeline insights, credit-based usage, email verification/password reset flows, feedback tooling, and PII anonymization maintenance scripts for deleted-user records.

title: AI Chat Scheduler
shortDescription: A conversational AI assistant that helps event attendees discover sessions and build personalized, conflict‑free schedules.
detailedDescription: This AI Event Scheduler lets attendees chat naturally to explore sessions, exhibitors, and tracks, then generates a tailored, day‑by‑day itinerary that avoids time conflicts and matches their interests. It supports multi‑day events and adaptive personalization, built as a Next.js web app using the Vercel AI SDK and OpenAI’s language models for conversational understanding and planning.

title: GEO Audit
shortDescription: A GEO analyzer that scores how likely a webpage is to be cited by AI search engines using structured LLM audits.
detailedDescription: A React 19 + Vite frontend with an Express API proxy that keeps LLM keys server-side and audits URLs against GEO metrics: Fact Density, Entity Salience, and Extractability. Supports Gemini and OpenAI providers, schema-validates JSON outputs, and presents scorecards, findings, recommendations, and citation previews in a report-first UI.
